text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During one of our summer camp training
sessions...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heeheehee! That tickles!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thanks for the massage!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It used to hurt a bit, but lately it's been totally
fine! More than anything, it just kinda tickles!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
For a while there I was worried I wouldn't be able
to enter the Kikuka Sho, but now it'll be a piece
of carrot cake!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to the hard work you've been doing
to help me get through this.
choice_data_list: We'll need to keep at it for the Kikuka Sho.
We'll need to keep at it for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'll pay you back by bringing the victory
home with me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, I've been trying to think up some
training methods that'll be easier on my legs.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Since we made a promise to both work hard, I was
thinking maybe there was something I could do
too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, the first one I thought of is water volleyball.
Since it's in the water, I won't have to use my legs
as much!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The second option is free diving! If I'm lucky, I
might even catch some sea urchins!
choice_data_list: Those just sound like you want to have fun...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, the best kind of training is something
I can enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just about having fun, you know.
Activities that use your whole body really do give
you a good workout.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Come on, whaddya say?
choice_data_list: All right, water volleyball it is.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you go change into your swimsuit while I
go get the ball!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, duh! I can't play volleyball by myself!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Anyways! Get changed already! I'm not gonna go
easy on you either, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! You gotta be faster off the mark, or you'll
never reach the ball in time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We play so hard, I break a sweat. This is
definitely a workout.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yay! I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, then I'm off! I promise I'll bring you back
some goodies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio dives in. Some time passes, and...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Look how many sea cucumbers I got!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I grabbed every last one I could find, so let's
chow down on 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see a staggeringly large pile of sea cucumbers
behind Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I praise her for managing to collect so many, but
tell her there's absolutely no way we can finish all
of them.
